title: AnsibleTask
description: Manages an Ansible Task — a single module invocation within a Play.

module.description: Ansible module to invoke (e.g. apt, copy, template).

args.description: Free-form arguments passed to the Ansible module.

when.description: Conditional expression that must evaluate to true for the task to run.

notify.description: List of handler names to notify when this task changes state.

register.description: Variable name to store the task result in.

tags.description: Tags that can be used to selectively run or skip this task.

become.description: Whether to run this task with privilege escalation (sudo).
